name: ttrpg
description: Solo tabletop RPG toolkit on autonomous local game domains (R): pc (player-character sheets — new, fill, reorganize, log-session, show, companion), campaign (GM prep — synopsis, fronts/clocks, NPCs, factions, session prep; ex-obs:rpg), solo-mc (live play under Claude Code — play, scene, oracle, roll, setup, journal-pdf) with its narrateur and oracle agents. Extracted from obs (0.26.0); consumes obs:lore-extract and obs:rules-keeper for canon/mj content on the same game domain.
